title: Hyperliquid Sentiment
summary_title: Margin lending unlocks 15-20% APY on Hyperliquid, plus perp positions as collateral
summary_description: Sentiment launches native margin lending on Hyperliquid EVM. Borrow up to 15x leverage on wrapped staked HYPE, and soon use perpetual positions as collateral for delta-neutral strategies.

key_moments.label: Zerx Snarks introduces Sentiment as margin lending protocol
Origins: TradFi founders seeking efficient capital access during DeFi summer
Core mechanic: $100k HYPE collateral → $1M USDC borrow without looping
15x leverage on wrapped staked HYPE yields 15-20% APY next week
Purpose collateral: trade perps as collateral, borrow against unrealized P&L
Coin margin perpetuals coming via Hyperliquid EVM, filling native gap
Launch timeline: USDC support within 4 weeks, audits within 6, precompiles within 6
Sentiment already live with points incentives launching within days

pull_quote: You have a perp position worth a million dollars in the money and don't want to sell—now you can borrow against that unrealized profit without closing.
